# QCV - AI-Powered CV Builder

> QCV is a premium CV builder website that helps users create professional, ATS-friendly resumes with 15+ templates, AI scoring, and public portfolio pages.

## Overview
QCV provides a complete CV/resume building platform with:
- 15+ professional ATS-friendly CV templates
- AI-powered CV scoring and improvement suggestions
- Job description matching
- Public portfolio pages with PDF download
- Multiple CV management
- Dark/light mode
- Arabic and English support

## Key Pages
- Home: https://qcv.vexonet.online/
- Editor: https://qcv.vexonet.online/editor.html
- Templates: https://qcv.vexonet.online/templates.html
- Pricing: https://qcv.vexonet.online/pay.html
- Help: https://qcv.vexonet.online/help.html
- Careers: https://qcv.vexonet.online/careers.html
- Login: https://qcv.vexonet.online/login.html

## Pricing
- Free Plan: 1 CV, 1 template (Classic), 1 PDF download, watermark
- Pro Plan: 99 EGP/month (79 EGP/yearly) - 5 CVs, all templates, AI, portfolio
- Unlimited Plan: 299 EGP/month (239 EGP/yearly) - Everything unlimited
- 48h Pass: 30 EGP - Full access for 48 hours

## API Endpoints
QCV uses Firebase for backend services. Authentication is required for most features.

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +201028707543
- Email: support@qcv.vexonet.online
